text: V5 spec §4.3 zero-init gates + §5.3 gate_max gate ∈ [0.02, 0.8] within 5000 SFT steps are incompatible without a cold-start intervention which the spec does not mandate. Defer to V5.1 spec.

GL-Fusion training uses transformers (forward+loss); production inference uses vLLM (custom kernels). vLLM doesn't support GL-Fusion wrapper modules (mp_modules, ca_modules, fusion_gates). A trained GL-Fusion model cannot be served WITH its graph-fusion modules active via existing inference. Defer architecture decision to V5.1.
